message:
feat(ensemble): add velocity tracking for mode output analysis

VelocityTracker module for analyzing findings yield per token spent:

- VelocityTracker: Aggregates findings velocity metrics across modes
- VelocityEntry: Per-mode stats including tokens spent, findings count,
  unique findings, and velocity (findings per 1k tokens)
- VelocityReport: Summary with overall velocity, per-mode breakdown,
  high/low performers lists, and optimization suggestions

Enables synthesis pipeline to identify which reasoning modes provide
the best return on token investment, helping optimize mode selection
for future ensemble runs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
